## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] **No personal data** in the diff or history (no real exports/workbooks/screenshots).
- [ ] Tests added/updated; **Python and TypeScript cores still agree** on the fixtures.
- [ ] `pytest`, core `npm test` + `typecheck`, and web `npm run check && build` pass locally.
- [ ] No new network calls / CDN / dependencies without justification; CSP untouched (or explained).
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or usage changed.
